name: Tetrofosmin
description: Tetrofosmin is used as a diagnostic radiopharmaceutical agent for the preparation of Tc99m Tetrofosmin injection. Tetrofosmin forms a cationic complex where the radioisotope, technetium-99m, is chelated by two tetrofosmin molecules. The complex is used in the scintigraphic imaging of the myocardium to assess areas of reversible myocardial ischemia in the presence or absence of infracted myocardium. Tc99m Tetrofosmin is also used to assess ventricular function.
